overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit urban plaza. The environment features holographic glass displays, digital billboards, outdoor seating areas, and vibrant cyan and purple neon lighting throughout the commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic covered walkway with holographic glass walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated covered walkway beside the glass holographic structure

notable_agents.action: woman in red top walking toward the camera along the walkway

entered.detail: large transparent glass wall displaying cyan holographic data visualizations and graphs
continuous cyan neon strips running along the left wall of the corridor
large illuminated advertisement showing a character with purple hair
white outdoor umbrellas visible in the plaza area ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated covered walkway featuring a prominent glass structure on the right displaying holographic data visualizations. Cyan neon light strips line the left wall alongside digital billboards. The walkway is sparsely populated with pedestrians, including a woman in a red top walking toward the camera.

events.description: transitions from glass walkway section into corridor dominated by large digital billboards

agents.ego_description: continuing through the corridor passing large digital advertisements on the walls

notable_agents.action: woman in black business attire walking toward the camera while holding a bag

entered.detail: large red digital billboard displaying 'ZEIG DICH' text with a figure in white
modern benches along the right wall where NPCs are seated

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a more enclosed corridor section featuring prominent digital billboards including a large red advertisement with 'ZEIG DICH' text. The glass holographic structure falls behind as the character approaches the corridor exit leading to the open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with outdoor seating and circular bar

events.description: exits the enclosed corridor into the open plaza with outdoor seating and white umbrellas
turns slightly right to navigate around the outdoor seating area with white umbrellas

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, navigating around seating areas and observing the environment

notable_agents.action: person in blue hat sitting on bench looking at their phone

entered.detail: large white outdoor umbrellas shading seating tables in the plaza center
circular bar structure with glowing cyan base and purple neon accents
futuristic purple chairs with glowing bases arranged around tables

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the corridor, the scene opens into a spacious plaza featuring white umbrellas over outdoor seating and a prominent circular bar with glowing neon accents. Several NPCs are seated on benches using their phones while others walk through the area. The character navigates around the seating arrangement while approaching the bar area.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza area with AVANTE storefront and circular bar seating

events.description: slows slightly while approaching and passing two NPCs standing near the AVANTE storefront

agents.ego_description: walking along the circular bar and approaching the AVANTE storefront while observing NPCs

notable_agents.action: two men conversing near the AVANTE entrance, one smoking a cigarette

entered.detail: illuminated storefront sign reading 'AVANTE' above the entrance
tall bamboo plants in decorative golden pots lining the walkway
large display windows showing interior lighting and reflections

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the AVANTE storefront while walking alongside the circular neon bar. Two NPCs stand conversing near the entrance, one smoking. The environment features dark marble flooring with pink neon accents and potted bamboo decorations. The circular bar remains prominent on the right as the character continues through the plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, neon-lit elevated walkway into a sprawling, open-air futuristic plaza. It begins along a covered path where cyan light strips and holographic data visualizations line the walls, passing a few pedestrians including a woman in a red top. As the character moves forward, the space tightens into an enclosed corridor dominated by a large red digital advertisement before the path opens up toward the plaza exit. The scene then expands into a spacious commercial area featuring white umbrellas over outdoor seating and a glowing circular bar where NPCs lounge on benches. Finally, the camera glides past the neon bar and potted bamboo decorations toward the AVANTE storefront, moving across dark marble flooring accented with pink light.
